arts.ttl: Howe will return when he is 100% ready - Tindall
arts.sum: Newcastle boss Eddie Howe will miss at least the next two Premier League matches as no timeframe is given for his return.

arts.ttl: Newcastle’s ‘long-standing relationship’ sees them beat European elite – ‘Significant financial leap’ convinces player
arts.sum: Antoñito Cordero’s move to Newcastle United is now a ‘done deal’ and the Malaga youngster will be moving to St James Park in the summer transfer window. That’s according to Marca, who report that an agreement is in place and brings and end to a ‘long-standing relationship’ that had been brewing since the start of The post Newcastle’s ‘long-standing relationship’ sees them beat European elite – ‘Significant financial leap’ convinces player appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Jason Tindall ready to lead Newcastle for rest of season in place of Eddie Howe
arts.sum: Howe remains in hospital being treated for pneumonia ‘No exact timeframe’ for manager’s return, says Tindall Jason Tindall is ready to take charge of Newcastle for the remainder of the season as Eddie Howe recovers from pneumonia. With Newcastle’s manager still in hospital on Tyneside, his assistant will lead the team against Crystal Palace at St James’ Park on Wednesday night and at Aston Villa on Saturday but, if necessary, Tindall is prepared to deputise for longer. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Sources: Newcastle 'over the moon' after agreeing to sign Spanish teenager who Arsenal and Tottenham wanted
arts.sum: Newcastle United sources have confirmed to TBR Football that they have clinched the signature of Malaga teenager Antonio Cordero. The teenager is out-of-contract this summer,...

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs. Crystal Palace: Jason Tindall issues latest Eddie Howe, Joe Willock update before Premier League clash
arts.sum: Newcastle assistant Jason Tindall delivers a fresh update on manager Eddie Howe - who has been diagnosed with pneumonia - and midfielder Joe Willock ahead of Wednesday's Premier League clash with Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Chelsea prepare HUGE swap deal to re-sign Marc Guehi
arts.sum: Chelsea are willing to pay over the odds in a player-plus-cash deal for Marc Guehi, according to a report. The Blues want to bring back Eagles star Marc Guehi and are looking to offer up Chalobah in a swap deal.

arts.ttl: Player could become ‘bargaining chip’ in moves involving Manchester United and Newcastle United
arts.sum: Newcastle United and Manchester United have been linked with a move for Juventus’ Dusan Vlahovic over the past few months. arts.ttl: Newcastle transfer news: Magpies 'complete deal' to sign Spanish winger who snubs Real Madrid, Barcelona
arts.sum: Newcastle United reportedly beat Barcelona and Real Madrid in the race to sign Malaga's teenage winger Antonio Cordero this summer.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe's assistant offers update on Newcastle boss after pneumonia diagnosis
arts.sum: Eddie Howe missed Newcastle’s 4-1 win against Manchester United over the weekend after being hospitalised with pneumonia and Jason Tindall has now offered a fresh update on his boss

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe health latest as Newcastle United assistant says he's had 'minimal contact' with stricken boss
arts.sum: The Toon Army have been rallying behind the cup-winning gaffer after he was hospitalised last week with pneumonia
